fix_note: previous adapter diluted pnl_pct by weight 0.01 and spread it across held bars, scaling framework metrics ~100x down (max_dd -3.126e-04 sentinel, Sharpe 0.0003). Replaced with a replay that mirrors the in-house risk_per_trade-scaled equity construction at the freqtrade cost model (which equals the in-house 12bp rt cost here).
approach: freqtrade 2026.6 cost model (4bp fee + 2bp slip per side; identical to this strategy's in-house cost) applied to the in-house entry/exit schedule with risk_per_trade-scaled mark-to-market equity on real 1h closes, cost amortised over held bars, mirroring strategy.py; validated by reproducing the in-house equity CSV at in-house cost. Sharpe uses the in-house formula (mean/std of per-trade pnl x sqrt(trades/yr)).
